name: Mediterranean Spring Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Potatoes, new - sliced into rings
1 small Onion, purple - thinly sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water for about 25 minutes or until tender. Drain well and cool slightly.
2. Peel the potatoes and thinly slice them. Place in a shallow bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, and salt. Mix well.
4. Pour the dressing over the potatoes and marinate for 1 hour.
5. Drain the potatoes, reserving the marinade.
6. Arrange salad greens in a large bowl. Top with sliced potatoes, tomato wedges, green pepper rings, onion slices, cucumber pieces, crumbled feta cheese, and anchovy fillets (if desired).
7. Serve with the reserved marinade.
